Bash(python << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageChops
import os

src = r"C:\\Users\\user\\Projects\\Leeztruestyles.com\\public\\images\\leeztruelogo.jpeg"
icons_dir = r"C:\\Users\\user\\Projects\\Leeztruestyles.com\\public\\icons"

img = Image.open\(src\).convert\("RGB"\)
print\(f"Source size: {img.size}"\)

# Find bounding box of non-black content
# Convert to grayscale and threshold
gray = img.convert\("L"\)
# Find pixels above threshold \(not black\)
threshold = 20
bbox = None
pixels = gray.load\(\)
w, h = gray.size
min_x, min_y, max_x, max_y = w, h, 0, 0
for y in range\(h\):
    for x in range\(w\):
        if pixels[x, y] > threshold:
            min_x = min\(min_x, x\)
            min_y = min\(min_y, y\)
            max_x = max\(max_x, x\)
            max_y = max\(max_y, y\)

print\(f"Content bbox: \({min_x}, {min_y}, {max_x}, {max_y}\)"\)

# Add small padding \(5% of content size\)
content_w = max_x - min_x
content_h = max_y - min_y
pad = int\(min\(content_w, content_h\) * 0.05\)

crop_x1 = max\(0, min_x - pad\)
crop_y1 = max\(0, min_y - pad\)
crop_x2 = min\(w, max_x + pad\)
crop_y2 = min\(h, max_y + pad\)

# Make it square \(use the larger dimension\)
crop_w = crop_x2 - crop_x1
crop_h = crop_y2 - crop_y1
side = max\(crop_w, crop_h\)

# Center the square crop
cx = \(crop_x1 + crop_x2\) // 2
cy = \(crop_y1 + crop_y2\) // 2
sq_x1 = max\(0, cx - side // 2\)
sq_y1 = max\(0, cy - side // 2\)
sq_x2 = min\(w, sq_x1 + side\)
sq_y2 = min\(h, sq_y1 + side\)

print\(f"Square crop: \({sq_x1}, {sq_y1}, {sq_x2}, {sq_y2}\), size={sq_x2-sq_x1}x{sq_y2-sq_y1}"\)

cropped = img.crop\(\(sq_x1, sq_y1, sq_x2, sq_y2\)\)

sizes = [72, 96, 128, 144, 152, 192, 384, 512]
for size in sizes:
    out_path = os.path.join\(icons_dir, f"icon-{size}x{size}.png"\)
    resized = cropped.resize\(\(size, size\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    resized.save\(out_path, "PNG"\)
    print\(f"Saved {out_path}"\)

print\("Done!"\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

src = r"C:\\Users\\user\\Projects\\Leeztruestyles.com\\public\\images\\leeztruelogo.jpeg"
public_dir = r"C:\\Users\\user\\Projects\\Leeztruestyles.com\\public"
app_dir = r"C:\\Users\\user\\Projects\\Leeztruestyles.com\\src\\app"

img = Image.open\(src\).convert\("RGB"\)

# Use same crop as before \(content bbox with 5% padding, squared\)
gray = img.convert\("L"\)
pixels = gray.load\(\)
w, h = gray.size
min_x, min_y, max_x, max_y = w, h, 0, 0
for y in range\(h\):
    for x in range\(w\):
        if pixels[x, y] > 20:
            min_x = min\(min_x, x\)
            min_y = min\(min_y, y\)
            max_x = max\(max_x, x\)
            max_y = max\(max_y, y\)

content_w = max_x - min_x
content_h = max_y - min_y
pad = int\(min\(content_w, content_h\) * 0.05\)
crop_x1 = max\(0, min_x - pad\)
crop_y1 = max\(0, min_y - pad\)
crop_x2 = min\(w, max_x + pad\)
crop_y2 = min\(h, max_y + pad\)
crop_w = crop_x2 - crop_x1
crop_h = crop_y2 - crop_y1
side = max\(crop_w, crop_h\)
cx = \(crop_x1 + crop_x2\) // 2
cy = \(crop_y1 + crop_y2\) // 2
sq_x1 = max\(0, cx - side // 2\)
sq_y1 = max\(0, cy - side // 2\)
sq_x2 = min\(w, sq_x1 + side\)
sq_y2 = min\(h, sq_y1 + side\)
cropped = img.crop\(\(sq_x1, sq_y1, sq_x2, sq_y2\)\)

# Generate favicon.ico with multiple sizes \(16, 32, 48\)
ico_sizes = [\(16, 16\), \(32, 32\), \(48, 48\)]
ico_images = [cropped.resize\(s, Image.LANCZOS\) for s in ico_sizes]

# Save favicon.ico to public/ \(served at /favicon.ico\)
favicon_path = os.path.join\(public_dir, "favicon.ico"\)
ico_images[0].save\(favicon_path, format="ICO", sizes=ico_sizes\)
print\(f"Saved {favicon_path}"\)

# Also save as favicon.ico in src/app/ \(Next.js App Router auto-serves it\)
app_favicon_path = os.path.join\(app_dir, "favicon.ico"\)
ico_images[0].save\(app_favicon_path, format="ICO", sizes=ico_sizes\)
print\(f"Saved {app_favicon_path}"\)

# Save a 32x32 PNG for metadata
icon32_path = os.path.join\(public_dir, "icons", "icon-32x32.png"\)
cropped.resize\(\(32, 32\), Image.LANCZOS\).save\(icon32_path, "PNG"\)
print\(f"Saved {icon32_path}"\)

print\("Done!"\)
EOF)
